ERRORS.NETWORK: No connection. Check your network and try again.
ERRORS.SERVER: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.

HOME.LEDE: A GPS-based, real-world hide-and-seek game. Enter the playfield. Don't get caught.
HOME.UPLINK_FAILED_BODY: Command server unreachable. Your operative file could not be retrieved. Check your signal and re-enter the field.
HOME.LOCATION_DENIED_BODY: The Prey cannot be played without location access. Grant location permission to The Prey in your device settings to enter the field.

PLAYFIELD_DETAIL.TITLE: PLAYFIELD
PLAYFIELD_DETAIL.ERROR_SAVE: FAILED TO SAVE PLAYFIELD — TRY AGAIN

PLAYFIELD_LIST.TITLE: PLAYFIELDS
PLAYFIELD_LIST.DELETE_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: This playfield will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
PLAYFIELD_LIST.INTRO_MESSAGE: A playfield is a GPS area you draw on the map — a polygon that marks the boundaries of play. Games of The Prey happen inside a playfield: stay within its borders or you're out. Create your own private playfields, or search public ones shared by other players.
PLAYFIELD_LIST.PUBLIC_SEARCH_HINT: TYPE AT LEAST 3 CHARACTERS TO SEARCH.

PLAYFIELD_CREATE.TITLE: NEW PLAYFIELD
PLAYFIELD_CREATE.ERROR_CREATE: FAILED TO CREATE PLAYFIELD — TRY AGAIN

GAME_CREATE.TITLE: NEW OPERATION
GAME_CREATE.SUBTITLE: CONFIGURE MISSION PARAMETERS
GAME_CREATE.ERROR_CREATE: OPERATION FAILED — CHECK YOUR SIGNAL AND RETRY
GAME_CREATE.INTRO_MESSAGE: Configure your mission parameters, then deploy. Pick an operational area (a playfield) where the game takes place, set the mission duration, and decide how long hunters wait before they're released. Once you deploy, other players join your lobby — when everyone's ready, the hunt begins.

GAME_LOBBY.TITLE: LOBBY
GAME_LOBBY.SUBTITLE: AWAITING OPERATIVES
GAME_LOBBY.ASSIGN_HINT: TAP AN OPERATIVE TO ASSIGN THEM AS HUNTER — EVERYONE ELSE BECOMES PREY
GAME_LOBBY.LOAD_ERROR: FAILED TO LOAD LOBBY — CHECK YOUR SIGNAL
GAME_LOBBY.START_HINT: DESIGNATE A HUNTER AND WAIT FOR ALL OPERATIVES TO STAND BY

GAME_JOIN.TITLE: ACCESS CODE
GAME_JOIN.SUBTITLE: ENTER THE 4-DIGIT CODE PROVIDED BY THE GAME HOST
GAME_JOIN.ERROR_WRONG_CODE: INVALID ACCESS CODE — CHECK THE CODE AND TRY AGAIN
GAME_JOIN.ERROR_FULL: OPERATION IS FULL — MAXIMUM NUMBER OF OPERATIVES REACHED
GAME_JOIN.ERROR_SERVER: COMMAND UNREACHABLE — SOMETHING WENT WRONG, TRY AGAIN LATER

GAME_SHARE.TITLE: Join me on The Prey!
GAME_SHARE.MESSAGE: You are invited to join a game on The Prey! Tap the link to join, then enter this code:

GAME_TRACKING.NOTIFICATION_BODY: Reporting your position to command. Tracking continues while the app is in the background.

GAME_PROGRESS.GPS_DENIED_MSG: Location permission is denied. Enable location access for The Prey to stay in the game.
GAME_PROGRESS.GPS_UNAVAILABLE_MSG: Can't get a GPS fix. Move to open sky and make sure location is switched on.
GAME_PROGRESS.REPORTING_DEGRADED_MSG: Can't reach command. Your position isn't being shared — check your connection.

GAME_OUTCOME.HUNTERS_WIN: All prey were captured. The hunter prevailed.
GAME_OUTCOME.PREYS_WIN: The prey evaded capture and made it out.
GAME_OUTCOME.CANCELLED: The operation was aborted before it concluded.

SURROUNDINGS_WARNING.TITLE: SAFETY BRIEFING
SURROUNDINGS_WARNING.HEADING: STAY AWARE OF YOUR SURROUNDINGS
SURROUNDINGS_WARNING.BODY_1: This operation takes place in public spaces — on streets, in parks, and around traffic.
SURROUNDINGS_WARNING.BODY_2: You must always remain aware of your surroundings, other people, cyclists, and vehicles — even when focused on the game.
SURROUNDINGS_WARNING.BODY_3: No game objective is worth risking your safety or the safety of others.
SURROUNDINGS_WARNING.ACKNOWLEDGE: I HAVE READ THIS BRIEFING AND AGREE TO STAY ALERT AT ALL TIMES

TAG_MODAL.TITLE: TAG PREY
TAG_MODAL.INSTRUCTION: Select a target to tag them out.

HUNTER_DELAY.LABEL: HUNTER RELEASE IN
HUNTER_DELAY.HINT: The hunter must stay put until the countdown ends.
HUNTER_DELAY.MOVE_WARNING_BODY: If you move during the release delay, you go live for 10 minutes after the countdown ends.
